# Designsystemet Basic React App

React app with Designsystemet components, Vite, and TypeScript

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Web Application Templates |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Tools** | dev-typescript |
| **Website** | [https://designsystemet.no](https://designsystemet.no) |
| **Docs** | [https://storybook.designsystemet.no](https://storybook.designsystemet.no) |

## About

A React application using Designsystemet from Digdir with blog cards, Vite for development, TypeScript support, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.
